module: ABS/ASC Mk4G — Anti-lock braking / stability control
note: Keyed on exact German ORTTEXT string returned by the ECU (variant-agnostic).

faults.Drehzahlfuehler vorne links Triggersigna: Wheel-speed sensor, front left, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler vorne rechts Triggersign: Wheel-speed sensor, front right, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler hinten links Triggersign: Wheel-speed sensor, rear left, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler hinten rechts Triggersig: Wheel-speed sensor, rear right, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler vorne links Anfahrerkenn: Wheel-speed sensor, front left, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler vorne rechts Anfahrerken: Wheel-speed sensor, front right, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler hinten links Anfahrerken: Wheel-speed sensor, rear left, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler hinten rechts Anfahrerke: Wheel-speed sensor, rear right, pull-away detection
